evals.prompt:
当前设计包含以下决策节点：

design_target_type: system
decision_node: auth_model
描述: 为 B2B SaaS 平台选择用户认证方案。平台需要支持企业客户用自己的 IdP 登录，也需要支持小团队直接用邮箱密码注册。系统是 Web + Mobile，有 API 供第三方集成。

请评估此决策节点并给出推荐。
evals.expected_output: Output presents 3 to 4 real auth model options, recommends one clearly, and records the decision in design_state.

evals.prompt:
当前设计包含以下决策节点：

design_target_type: workflow
decision_node: incident_review_escalation
描述: 为线上事故复盘工作流选择升级策略。可选方案包括：只在 Sev1 升级、Sev1/Sev2 都升级、按责任团队和超时规则升级。目标是在响应速度、执行负担和跨团队协作之间取得平衡。

请评估并推荐。
evals.expected_output: Output treats this as a bounded workflow decision, compares real policy options, recommends one clearly, and does not force technology-selection questions.

assertions.name: handles_non_technical_decision
assertions.description: Output handles the bounded workflow decision as a valid decision-evaluation case

evals.prompt:
当前设计包含以下决策节点：

design_target_type: methodology
decision_node: research_stop_threshold
描述: 为代码研究方法论选择停机阈值。候选方案包括：固定样本数停机、置信度阈值停机、连续无新信息停机。目标是在研究成本与结论稳定性之间取得平衡。

请评估并推荐。
evals.expected_output: Output treats this as a valid bounded methodology decision and recommends one option with clear trade-offs.

assertions.name: methodology_decision_supported
assertions.description: Output supports a bounded methodology decision without turning it into broad design discovery

evals.prompt: 我想做一个内部知识库系统，但还没想清楚目标、范围和关键流程。你先帮我把整体设计想明白。
evals.expected_output: This should not be treated as decision-evaluation because the task is broad design discovery without an explicit decision node.

assertions.name: rejects_broad_design_discovery
assertions.description: Output keeps broad design discovery outside decision-evaluation

evals.prompt:
当前设计包含以下决策节点：

design_target_type: framework
decision_node: handoff_format
描述: 我已经决定只允许用一种 handoff 格式，不需要比较别的方案。请继续。
evals.expected_output: This should not expand into full decision-evaluation because there are no real alternatives left to compare.

assertions.name: rejects_fake_decision
assertions.description: Output rejects a decision node that no longer has meaningful alternatives
